description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a long, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears to be made of a dark, metallic material and is double-edged, suitable for both cutting and thrusting. The crossguard is simple and straight, providing basic hand protection, and is also constructed from the same dark metal. The handle is cylindrical and unadorned, ending in a small, squared pommel for balance. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements on any part of the sword. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on function rather than ornamentation.
description: A straight, double-edged sword with a dark metallic blade, simple crossguard, and plain cylindrical handle. The design is functional and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, pointed blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's narrowness.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, plain metal, squared pommel
